ideation: This animation sequence will depict the robot carefully holding a chain, emphasizing the weight and texture of the links.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, highlighting the precision required to handle such an object. Frame 1 starts with both arms extended slightly forward, palms up, as if receiving the chain. In frame 2, the right arm lowers slightly, the wrist tilting to grip an imaginary link. The left arm moves in to support the chain's weight. Frame 3 will show both arms adjusting to hold the chain securely, with a slight inward rotation. Frame 4 depicts a pause, emphasizing the chain's weight. Finally, frame 5 shows both arms slightly lifting, suggesting a careful upward movement of the chain.

frames.beat: arms extend forward, palms up, ready to receive
right arm lowers, wrist tilts to grip the chain
both arms adjust to hold the chain securely
a pause, emphasizing the chain's weight
arms lift slightly, carefully moving the chain upwards
